# Copilot Instructions

This repository's development instructions for AI coding agents live in [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md). Read it first.

It covers the repo layout, how the marketplace manifest maps to plugins, the validation command
(`python scripts/validate_marketplace.py`), versioning rules, the spec-and-test discipline (every
feature or behavior change needs a feature-id row in its owning spec plus a covering test in the same
PR), the authorship and contribution policy, branch/PR rules, the auto-updater hook's portability
constraints, and house style (plain ASCII, LF line endings, minimal comments).
